sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 9. Trading book and market risk thresholds, the boundary between trading book and non-trading book and reclassifications
sections.description: Details on trading book thresholds and reclassifications.

sections.heading: 9.1 C 90.00 – Trading book and market risk thresholds
sections.description: Template for reporting trading book and market risk thresholds.

sections.heading: 9.2 The boundary between trading book and non-trading book (BOU)
sections.description: Information on the composition of the trading book.

sections.heading: 9.3 C 24.01 - Trading book boundary - Reclassifications between books (MOV)
sections.description: Template for reporting reclassifications between trading and non-trading books.

C 90.05.description: Reports information on the composition of the trading book.

C 24.01.name: C 24.01 - Trading book boundary - Reclassifications between books (MOV)
C 24.01.description: Reports information on the reclassification of positions between trading and non-trading books.
